blended.narrative: Kicking Horse is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.3 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,827 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
